tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to redo their work because they're busy. Given our strong trust, I'll agree but need to ensure the timeline still works for us both.

desires: Secure Teammate_A's reassurance that I won't be left out of the final presentation, since their absence is now a real risk to our group standing.
Ensure my own deadline (Mon 19:00) is met without burning out, because I know I'll have two full tasks and don't want to look incompetent tomorrow.
Maintain the trust we've built with this team by handling the extra work efficiently, even though it means sacrificing some personal leisure time.

goals.description: Directly address teammate_A's offer to take over their part; clarify that I need to finish my own share first, then explicitly request their reassurance on the presentation inclusion.
goals.rationale: My affiliation axis demands I secure our group standing and maintain trust with close colleagues. However, my assertive nature requires me to set a clear boundary now rather than accepting their offer blindly, ensuring I don't burn out before the deadline while still prioritizing our relationship outcome.

goals.description: Execute the 'finish my share' plan for the afternoon (Mon 13:00-18:00) with high focus to guarantee the Mon 19:00 deadline is met without last-minute panic.
goals.rationale: Meeting this deadline is non-negotiable for my self-respect and avoiding incompetence tomorrow. My deliberate time horizon means I am already planning for the long-term consequence of looking incompetent, so I must protect my energy and competence today.

goals.description: Review the final presentation outline tonight to mentally confirm my spot in it, using this preparation as a buffer against the stress of the new workload.
goals.rationale: This supports my goal of securing reassurance and maintaining trust. Since I have sleep debt, I will defer the heavy work until after I've rested or during a low-energy slot to avoid further depletion, keeping the emotional weight of the task manageable.

agent.last_reasoning: Affiliation demands securing our standing, but assertiveness requires setting a boundary now to avoid burnout. I will finish my share first (g2), then explicitly request reassurance on the presentation inclusion from teammate_A to maintain trust without accepting their offer blindly.

action.name: message

args.content: 네, 네가 도와주려는 건 알지만 내 파트는 내가 먼저 다쳐야 해. 오늘 오후 13-18 시까지 끝내면, 발표에 포함될지 확신받으려면 직접 확인해줘.

action.reasoning: Affiliation demands securing our standing, but assertiveness requires setting a boundary now to avoid burnout. I will finish my share first (g2), then explicitly request reassurance on the presentation inclusion from teammate_A to maintain trust without accepting their offer blindly.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: '네, 네가 도와주려는 건 알지만 내 파트는 내가 먼저 다쳐야 해. 오늘 오후 13-18 시까지 끝내면, 발표'.
